releaseNotes:
- UI modernization and navigation improvements, and many more...

Team Netra

changelog.text: Added Torrent support with metadata, controls, and streaming.
Introduced TorrentProvider for state, metadata, and stats updates.
Added custom DRM player on Desktop with a redesigned UI.
Improved torrent UI for portrait and landscape layouts.
Optimized torrent playback, lifecycle, and streaming stability.
Fixed URL decoding for better extractor compatibility.

lockMessage: The app is temporarily locked for maintenance. Please check back later.
